title: Darling, How Could You!
writer: Dodie Smith, Lesser Samuels, J.M. Barrie
actors: Joan Fontaine, John Lund, Mona Freeman
plot: When an imaginative girl has fantasies that her mother is having an affair, her visions almost ruin her parents domestic life. Based on the play "Alice Sit By The Fire" by James M. Barrie.
